hero.headline: Your notes, only yours.
hero.subtitle: Zero-Knowledge encryption. Create notes and folders protected by password. Not even we can read them.

encryption.title: Encryption
encryption.desc: Each note with its own password.

folders.title: Folders
folders.desc: Group notes with a shared password.

zeroKnowledge.title: Zero-Knowledge
zeroKnowledge.desc: The server never sees the content.

step2.title: Create notes
step2.desc: Title, content and a password per note.

step3.title: Unlock when you need
step3.desc: Enter the password and read or edit.

security.title: Security
security.text: Zero-Knowledge with AES. Your passwords never leave your device to decrypt. The backend only stores encrypted data.

dashboard.title: My notes
dashboard.createFirst: Create your first note or folder.

notes.enterPassword: Enter the password to unlock this note.
notes.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this note? This action cannot be undone.
notes.moveWarning: The note will be moved to the selected folder. The note's password will not change.

folders.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this folder and all its notes?
folders.enterPassword: Enter the password to access this folder.

errors.emailInUse: This email is already in use.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist.
